title: Apple sues OpenAI for alleged trade secret theft through employee poaching
summary: Apple accuses OpenAI of orchestrating a campaign to recruit its engineers and appropriate protected technologies.

title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 with Sol, Terra and Luna models and solves a 50-year-old math problem
summary: The new version of OpenAI's AI includes optimized models that achieve milestones in mathematical reasoning and is made available to the public.

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work and acknowledges launch issues while improving user experience
summary: The company rushes to fix bugs in its new work tool and announces the closure of the Atlas browser.

title: AMD cuts price of Radeon RX 9070 GRE to under $500 to compete in mid-range market
summary: The RDNA 4 graphics card drops 9% in price just a month after launch to take on Nvidia in 1440p gaming.

title: RTX 50 hotspot temperature sensor still accessible via Nvidia's internal MODS tool
summary: RTX 5070 Ti reaches 107 °C due to poor thermal paste application, and diagnosis is only possible with internal tools.

title: Terrorist groups use AI chatbots to plan attacks and develop weapons
summary: According to a report, extremist organizations exploit tools like ChatGPT for military purposes.

title: Critical vulnerability in Zimbra allows malicious code execution via manipulated emails
summary: The security flaw in the mail server could compromise user sessions without additional intervention.

title: Version 8.14.0 of npm package jscrambler distributes an information stealer written in Rust
summary: An attacker compromised the official release to infect systems during installation.

title: Cybercriminals use Balochistan police portal in multi-group espionage campaigns
summary: Several hacker groups leverage a government website to carry out intelligence operations.

title: China's Orca model matches specialized robotic systems without having seen any action labels
summary: The AI system achieves performance comparable to models trained with labeled data.

title: Meta Muse Spark 1.1 surpasses GLM-5.2 in programming tasks and is cheaper
summary: Meta's new model offers better performance in code generation at a lower cost.

title: OpenAI bets on families and brings ChatGPT to homes with family plans
summary: The company launches new subscriptions designed so that multiple household members can use the AI.

title: The race to emulate PS5 on PC begins before the launch of GTA 6
summary: 2D PS5 games are already running on emulators, although full support is still far off.

title: Xbox could launch Positron system to convert physical discs to digital next week
summary: The feature would allow users to redeem their disc games for digital copies.

title: SK Hynix warns that 2027 will be the worst year for memory shortage and that the crisis will last until 2030
summary: The CEO of the South Korean company forecasts a severe shortage of memory chips in the coming years.

title: TSMC plans to expand its photonic integrated circuit manufacturing capacity in the next two years
summary: The Taiwanese manufacturer bets on photonics to overcome the limits of silicon.

title: Lenovo unveils first ThinkPads with Wildcat Lake Core 7 360 processor and up to 32GB DDR5
summary: The new laptop range combines efficiency and next-generation memory.

title: LPCAMM2: The new standard that will replace soldered memory in gaming laptops
summary: This memory module format allows for easy upgrade and improves performance.

title: John Deere loses exclusive control over tractor repairs and is placed under supervision for 10 years
summary: The company must allow independent repairs after an agreement with farmers.

title: SGAE points to artificial intelligence as a new threat for 'pirating' authors' styles
summary: The Spanish rights management society denounces that AI reproduces the style of its members without authorization.
